product_name: Union Bank of India Vehicle Loan
tagline: Union Vehicle Loan — Your Vehicle, Your Choice

types.name: Union Vehicle Loan — Used Car
types.max_loan: 85% of valuation (vehicle age max 5 years old)

types.name: Union EV Loan (Electric Vehicle)
types.interest_rate: Special rate — 0.25% concession on standard car loan rate
types.benefit: Green initiative — lower rate for EV purchase

eligibility.employment: Salaried (1+ year current employer) / Self-employed (2+ years)

prepayment: NIL charges on floating rate loans

process_steps.title: Vehicle & Dealer Confirm
process_steps.detail: Obtain proforma invoice from authorized dealer

process_steps.title: Disbursement
process_steps.detail: Directly to dealer account — customer drives away

staff_tips: EV buyers get an extra 0.25% rate concession — always mention this
100% financing is available on select models — confirm with the dealer
For used cars, valuation is done first — check RC and insurance
Driving licence is mandatory — DL is compulsory for the loan (registration authority requirement)
